steps.title: Identify the goal in the sentence
steps.content: The blank is what's hard to do to "the spread of unwelcome weeds." The rest of the sentence ("hard to remove them completely") signals that the gardener is trying to stop the weeds from spreading.

steps.title: Match the precise word
steps.content:
The blank describes what a gardener does to "the spread of unwelcome weeds" — the rest of the sentence says it is hard to "remove them completely," so the blank must mean stopping or checking that spread. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Retrieving: getting something back or recovering it — you retrieve a lost item, not an unwanted weed; this implies bringing the weeds back, the opposite of what a gardener wants. ✘
  • Choice B — Saving: preserving or rescuing — this implies protecting the weeds, which contradicts the gardener's goal of eliminating them. ✘
  • Choice C — Halting: stopping or arresting the progress of something — directly fits; the gardener tries to stop the weeds from spreading further. ✔
  • Choice D — Pretending: acting as though something is true when it is not — makes no logical sense in the context of a physical gardening problem. ✘
That matches choice C — C is correct.
